headline: Chuckles McSnortberry Accidentally Invents Perpetual Motion Machine While Trying To Open Stubborn Jar
summary: The jar lid is now spinning eternally, and he still can't access his pickles.
fullBody: Chuckles McSnortberry has accidentally created a perpetual motion machine while attempting to open a particularly stubborn jar of pickles. 'I twisted and twisted, and now the lid just keeps spinning,' McSnortberry explained. 'It's physics, apparently.' The jar remains sealed, and the pickles remain unattainable. Physicists are baffled, but McSnortberry just wants his snack. 'I've created infinity, but at what cost?' he lamented.
